chunks.title: Call to Return and Repentance
chunks.reason: A unified call for Israel to return to God with specific words of confession and trust.

chunks.title: Promise of Restoration
chunks.reason: God speaks directly about healing, love, and the flourishing of Israel using nature imagery.

chunks.title: Conclusion on Wisdom
chunks.reason: A final exhortation to the wise to understand the preceding words and the nature of God's ways.
